executives.name: Badri Kothandaraman
executives.background: Badri Kothandaraman joined Enphase in April 2017 as Chief Operating Officer and was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer in September 2017. Prior to joining Enphase, he served in various capacities at Cypress Semiconductor for 21 years, including Executive Vice President of the Data Communications Division.

executives.name: Mandy Yang
executives.background: Mandy Yang was appointed Chief Financial Officer in June 2023. She joined Enphase in 2018 and previously served as Vice President, Finance and Corporate Controller. Before Enphase, she held finance leadership roles at Tesla and Spansion.

executives.name: Raghu Belur
executives.background: Raghu Belur is a co-founder of Enphase and has served as Chief Products Officer since February 2017. He has held various leadership roles in product management and engineering since the company's inception in 2006.

board_of_directors.name: Steven J. Gomo
board_of_directors.background: Steven Gomo has served as a director since March 2011. He was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of NetApp, Inc. from 2002 to 2011. He also serves on the boards of Micron Technology and Nutanix.

board_of_directors.name: Badri Kothandaraman
board_of_directors.background: Badri Kothandaraman has served as a director since September 2017 in addition to his role as President and CEO.

board_of_directors.name: Benjamin J. Kortlang
board_of_directors.background: Benjamin Kortlang has served as a director since May 2010. He is a Partner at G2 Venture Partners and was previously a Partner at Kleiner Perkins Caufield & Byers.

board_of_directors.name: Thurman J. Rodgers
board_of_directors.background: T.J. Rodgers has served as a director since January 2017. He is the founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jamie Haenggi
board_of_directors.background: Jamie Haenggi has served as a director since 2020. She is the President of ADT Solar and has held various executive roles at ADT since 2016.
